title: UI/UX Design
description: Master the art and science of User Interface and User Experience design. Learn industry-standard tools like Figma, Adobe XD, and Sketch while building a stunning portfolio of real-world projects.
what_you_learn: Color theory, typography, and visual hierarchy
requirements: Willingness to learn and practice daily

instructor.name: Adaeze Nwosu
instructor.title: Senior UX Designer at Google
instructor.bio: 10+ years of experience in product design. Previously worked at Meta and Uber. Passionate about teaching the next generation of designers.

title: Web App Development
description: Build modern, scalable web applications from scratch. This comprehensive program covers both frontend and backend development using the latest technologies and industry best practices.
what_you_learn: Node.js and Express.js for backend APIs
Database design with PostgreSQL and MongoDB
Deployment with Docker and cloud platforms

instructor.name: Chukwuemeka Obi
instructor.title: Full-Stack Engineer at Andela
instructor.bio: 8 years building enterprise web applications. Open source contributor and tech community mentor.

title: Data Science
description: Become a data scientist equipped to solve real business problems. Learn to collect, analyze, and visualize data using Python, and build predictive machine learning models.
what_you_learn: Data visualization with Matplotlib and Seaborn
requirements: Laptop with at least 8GB RAM recommended

instructor.name: Dr. Funke Adeyemi
instructor.title: Data Scientist at Flutterwave
instructor.bio: PhD in Applied Statistics. 7 years in data science across fintech and healthcare sectors.

title: Data Analysis
description: Turn raw data into actionable business insights. Learn Excel, SQL, and Power BI to analyze and present data in ways that drive smart business decisions.
what_you_learn: Advanced Excel functions, pivot tables, and dashboards
SQL for querying and managing databases
Power BI for interactive data visualization
Google Sheets for collaborative data work
Storytelling with data and presenting findings
requirements: Access to Microsoft Excel or Google Sheets

instructor.name: Biodun Lawal
instructor.title: Business Intelligence Analyst at GTBank
instructor.bio: 6 years transforming business data into strategic decisions. Certified Microsoft Power BI expert.

title: Python Programming
description: Python is the world's most versatile programming language. From automation to AI, master Python from the ground up and build real projects that solve real problems.
what_you_learn: Python syntax, data types, and control flow
Introduction to APIs and Flask web framework

instructor.name: Tunde Fashola
instructor.title: Software Engineer at Interswitch
instructor.bio: 9 years of Python development. Built production systems used by millions of Nigerians.

title: React JS
description: React is the most in-demand frontend library in the world. Build powerful, interactive user interfaces and single-page applications that employers are looking for.
what_you_learn: React components, props, and state management
Hooks: useState, useEffect, useContext, and custom hooks
Redux Toolkit for global state management
Testing React apps with Jest and React Testing Library

instructor.name: Kemi Adeola
instructor.title: Frontend Lead at Paystack
instructor.bio: 7 years specializing in React ecosystems. Speaker at multiple West African tech conferences.
